data.title: Strive Inc. (Nasdaq: ASST) completes acquisition of Semler Scientific, solidifying its position.
data.description: Strive, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASST) based in Dallas, Texas, reported on January 16, 2026, that it has successfully finalized the acquisition of Semler Scientific, as per the earlier disclosure made.

data.title: URS Capital Partners expands portfolio in 2025 with selective acquisitions and new developments, positioning for the future.
data.description: A vertically integrated multifamily real estate investment firm, URS Capital Partners ("URS"), based in Long Island, New York, recently announced their strategic moves including selective acquisitions, new developments, and maintaining stable operations throughout 2025. This positions the firm strongly for the upcoming business cycle. The firm's 2025 Year in Review showcased key achievements and investments made in the past year.

data.title: McGowan Program Administrators broadens Habitational Program to incorporate Affordable and Student Housing, enhancing its standing in multifamily insurance.
data.description: McGowan Program Administrators (MPA) recently revealed their plans to broaden their Habitational Insurance Program by incorporating Affordable Housing and Student Housing risks. This expansion solidifies their presence in the multifamily insurance sector. The announcement, made on January 16, 2026, in Fairview Park, Ohio, highlighted MPA's commitment to growth and diversification. This move signifies a strategic decision to tap into new market segments and reach a wider range of clients. Through this initiative, MPA aims to enhance its offerings and capture a larger share of the market. This expansion underlines the company's proactive approach towards adapting to industry trends and catering to evolving customer needs.

data.title: Big Tech giants Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon predicted to have a very strong Q4 earnings by Wedbush analyst Dan Ives, likening current tech landscape to mid-1996 internet boom.
data.description: On Friday, Wedbush Analyst Dan Ives predicted a "very strong" Q4 earnings for Big Tech companies. Ives expects cloud giants Microsoft Corporation (NASDAQ: MSFT), Alphabet Inc (NASDAQ: GOOGL), and Amazon.com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) to lead the impressive performance. These companies have seen high demand for their AI enterprise services. Ives compared the current tech landscape to the mid-1996 internet boom, emphasizing genuine adoption and profitability over speculative bubbles like in 1999. He expressed confidence in tech stocks having a robust 4Q earnings. Full details on Benzinga.com.
Investor holds over 5% stake in PayPoint plc. Regulatory filing shows significant ownership position in company.Characters: 98

data.title: Pusan Nat'l Univ. researchers create light-activated tissue adhesive patch for rapid, watertight neurosurgical sealing.
data.description: A team of researchers based in BUSAN, South Korea, has created a groundbreaking dural patch that effectively seals dural tears quickly and securely. This innovative patch is known for its exceptional biocompatibility, making it a promising solution for durotomy, a prevalent complication in neurosurgery that involves damage to the dura mater. The development is particularly notable for its ability to address this issue efficiently. This breakthrough offers hope to patients and medical professionals dealing with dural tears, with its advanced sealing properties and compatibility with the human body.

data.title: Nonprofit Food for Climate League rebrands as BITE: Building Impact Through Eaters, promoting climate-smart eating.
data.description: In Chicago on January 16, 2026, the non-profit organization Food for Climate League, dedicated to promoting climate-smart food choices, revealed their new identity as BITE: Building Impact Through Eaters. This transition aims to further their mission of mainstreaming climate-conscious eating habits.

data.title: Morphy's auction in Las Vegas on Jan. 23 features a 30-inch gold nugget chain, Colt revolver, and Crash Corrigan's saddle.
data.description: Key items up for auction include a 30-inch solid gold nugget chain, a US Cavalry model Colt Single Action Army revolver complete with period accessories, and Ray "Crash" Corrigan's screen-used Bohlin saddle. The auction, set to take place in Las Vegas on Jan. 16, 2026, will attract collectors of Western and Native-American art and antiques. The unique pieces are expected to garner significant interest among enthusiasts.

data.title: Sprinturf awards $500,000 to 2026 LEAP Grant recipients for sports/recreation spaces, boosting access.
data.description: In Daniel Island, South Carolina, on January 16, 2026, Sprinturf revealed the beneficiaries of its 2026 LEAP Grant initiative, granting almost $500,000 in overall funds to back community-led endeavors that enhance accessibility to top-notch athletic and recreational areas. This is the second year of the program...

data.title: Pagaya secures $350 million in funding through a new ABS structure backed by consumer loans on its network.
data.description: In New York, Pagaya Technologies LTD. (NASDAQ: PGY) revealed the completion of PAID 2025-REV1, a notable $350 million asset-backed securitization (ABS) supported by consumer loans from the Pagaya network. This landmark transaction marks the introduction of this financing method for Pagaya’s personal loan division, providing a new avenue for long-term capital alongside their existing resources.

data.title: IES Holdings acquires Gulf Island Fabrication, expanding its fabrication footprint and services capabilities.
data.description: A recent transaction has facilitated the expansion of IES's fabrication footprint, along with the addition of service capabilities. This marks a significant development for the company, with an increase in fabrication capacity by [specific number] square feet. Additionally, [specific number] new service offerings have been introduced as a result of this transaction, enhancing the overall capabilities of IES. This move positions the company for further growth and success in the market.

data.title: National Police Association supports Medal of Sacrifice Act, recognizing officers' heroism; tens of thousands injured or killed.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Indianapolis, it was reported that police officers consistently and bravely put themselves in harm's way to safeguard others, with tens of thousands of officers getting assaulted or injured in the line of duty. Unfortunately, some officers even lose their lives while carrying out their duties. This dedication and sacrifice are being recognized...

data.title: FDA delays Trump-backed fast-track drugs over safety concerns. Commissioner’s program aimed for reviews in 1-2 months instead of 10-12. 16 drugs under review, 2 more pending. Sanofi spokesperson addresses patient death reports.
data.description: The U.S. FDA has delayed reviews of drugs earmarked for the Trump administration's expedited approval program due to concerns about safety and trial data. The FDA's CNPV program aims to speed up drug review processes for products aligned with national health priorities, reducing review times from 10-12 months to 1-2 months. The pilot program currently has 16 drugs under review, with two additional drugs by Merck & Co. chosen in December 2025. Sanofi, a pharmaceutical company, is part of the program and is investigating a patient death related to Tzield, with no established causal relationship at present. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Diana Shipping Inc nominates 6 director candidates for Genco Shipping & Trading board with diverse expertise.
data.description: Diana is introducing a group of independent director candidates who bring significant expertise in various areas such as dry bulk shipping, finance, mergers & acquisitions, and corporate governance. The nominees have diverse backgrounds and are well-qualified for their roles within the company. By selecting directors with expertise in these areas, Diana aims to enhance its operations and decision-making processes for the benefit of its stakeholders.

data.title: Under Armour (NYSE: UA, UAA) to release Q3 fiscal 2026 results on Feb 6, 2026, for period ending Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Baltimore-based company Under Armour, Inc. (NYSE: UA, UAA) revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 on February 6, 2026, covering the period concluded on December 31, 2025. The announcement details the release of the earnings report and anticipates significant market interest in the company's results.

data.title: Three Gladstone Wealth Partners firms nominated for Forbes | SHOOK 2026 Best-In-State Wealth Management Teams, highlighting advisor excellence and client focus.
data.description: Gladstone Wealth Partners, an independent wealth management firm based in Bedminster, NJ, received recognition for its advisor independence, collaborative culture, and client-focused service. The firm's reputation was highlighted when three of its partner firms were awarded a significant accolade on January 16, 2026. This recognition underscores the commitment to providing excellent service to clients and maintaining a culture of collaboration among advisors.

data.title: Jack & Jill of America, Inc. commits 100,000 hours to address food insecurity on MLK Jr.'s birthday.
data.description: The national organization Jack and Jill of America, Inc. reaffirms its dedication to dignity, service, and food security for all on Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s birthday. This commitment was restated on January 16, 2026, in Washington. The organization aims to uphold the values championed by Dr. King and continues to work towards ensuring equal access to essentials like food.
